name: search-relevance-engineering
description: Search & retrieval engineering specialists — 4 agents (search-architect, relevance-engineer, vector-retrieval-engineer, search-eval-engineer) and 3 skills (lexical-vector-hybrid-retrieval, relevance-tuning, retrieval-evaluation) covering Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, vector and hybrid (BM25 + dense) search, embeddings, chunking, reranking, relevance tuning and evaluation (nDCG/MRR), and the RAG retrieval tier. Fills the gap that claude-app-engineering only touches at the app surface. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
